message:
fix(runtime): Fail fast on stdlib append operations

Fixed silent data loss in Python stdlib module operations:

unittest/runner.zig:
- fail() now panics on OOM when recording test failure

doctest.zig:
- Example parsing now panics on OOM instead of silently dropping examples
- Source/output line collection now panics on OOM instead of silently truncating

codecs.zig:
- Buffer appending now panics on OOM instead of silently losing data

async/runtime/loop.zig:
- Completed task tracking now panics on OOM instead of silently dropping tasks

tkinter/root.zig:
- Scheduled callback tracking now panics on OOM instead of silently dropping callbacks

profiling.zig:
- Profile result collection now panics on OOM instead of silently dropping entries

wsgiref.zig:
- HTTP header collection now panics on OOM instead of silently dropping headers

site.zig:
- Site prefix initialization now panics on OOM instead of silently failing

All changed from 'catch {}' to 'catch unreachable'.
